title: Xtra Salty Middle Eastern Cheese Knafeh
description: A salty and aerated Middle Eastern dish featuring doenjang and miso-marinate, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this gluten-free friendly Knafeh is a unique twist on traditional desserts
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thaw the knafeh dough according to package instructions.
In a small bowl, mix together the doenjang, miso paste, and melted butter.
Spread the dough into a large baking dish and brush with the doenjang mixture.
Sprinkle the shredded cheese over the dough, making sure to cover the entire surface.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the rose water, orange blossom water, salt, and sugar.
Pour the sugar mixture over the cheese, followed by the heavy cream and eggs.
Bake the knafeh for 35 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the knafeh from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional cheese and sugar if desired.
